message:
test: extend capability witness integration tests and refine PLAS burn-in gate suite

Expand capability_witness_integration tests with additional coverage for witness
index store persistence and escrow receipt workflows. Update PLAS burn-in gate
integration tests for consistency with latest module interface. Minor adjustment
to test262_release_gate module.
